# remoteVideoURL

**Instance Property**

A remote URL corresponding to a representative video for the URL.

## Declaration

```swift
var remoteVideoURL: URL? { get set }
```

## Discussion

This may reference a remote video file that [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AVFoundation] can stream, or a YouTube video URL.

## Getting the link’s video

- **videoProvider**: An object that retrieves data corresponding to a representative video for the URL.
